commands.description: Start the SereneDB pg-wire server, using the optional data directory and flags.
Open the embedded DuckDB shell without starting the SereneDB server.
Open the psql-compatible shell subcommand without starting the SereneDB server.

flagSources.description: Read flags from one or more files (one '--flag=value' per line, '#' comments OK).
Read each listed flag from FLAGS_<name>; missing env vars are an error.
Same as --fromenv but silently skip flags whose env var is unset.
Tolerate '--name1=...' even when no flag with that name exists (useful for shared flagfiles across binaries).

helpVariants.description: Flags whose name or description matches.
Print the build banner and exit.

flags.name: auth_api_key
flags.description: Static HTTP ApiKey credential as id:key (empty = ApiKey rejected).

flags.name: auth_bearer_token
flags.description: Static HTTP Bearer token (empty = Bearer rejected).

flags.name: auth_method
flags.description: Password auth method for --auth_password: scram (SCRAM-SHA-256, default), md5, or password (cleartext; requires TLS).

flags.name: auth_password
flags.description: Temporary single-user password (empty = trust). Placeholder until RBAC; SCRAM-SHA-256 by default. Cleartext password auth requires TLS.

flags.name: auth_timeout
flags.description: Max time from connect to authenticated, per connection (0 = off). pg: covers TLS+startup+auth; http: the request-header read deadline.

flags.name: auth_user
flags.description: User the temporary --auth_password / token credentials apply to.

flags.name: background_threads
flags.description: Number of background worker threads (drop / cleanup / maintenance tasks; later object-store prefetch). 0 = auto-detect.

flags.name: cpu_threads
flags.description: Executor pool size at process start. 0 = let server auto-detect from cpu_count. The SQL-level `SET threads = N` continues to win at runtime.

flags.name: http_body_timeout
flags.description: Max time to read one HTTP request body.

flags.name: http_cors_origins
flags.description: CORS allow-origin list for the HTTP/ES API: comma-separated origins or '*' (empty disables CORS). Echoes an allowed Origin and answers preflight OPTIONS.

flags.name: idle_session_timeout
flags.description: Close a session idle (between requests) longer than this. Drives the HTTP keep-alive idle timeout.

flags.name: io_threads
flags.description: IO threads for HTTP and pg-wire connections (0 = max(1, cpu_count / 4)).

flags.name: listen
flags.description: Listener URL(s), comma-separated or repeated (last-wins). Each is one listener: postgres://host:port[?sslmode=...], http(s)://host:port?api=es, postgres:///path/to.sock (unix).

flags.name: max_connections
flags.description: Max concurrent client connections across all listeners (0 = unlimited). Over-cap connections get 53300 (pg) / 503 (http) then close. Per-listener override via ?max_connections=.

flags.name: pg_max_message_bytes
flags.description: Maximum size of a single pg-wire message (statement text / bound parameter value). Bulk data should use COPY, which streams.

flags.name: server_directory
flags.description: Path to the database directory. A positional argument, if given, takes precedence.

flags.name: tls_ca
flags.description: Default PEM CA bundle to verify client certificates (sslmode=verify-ca/verify-full).

flags.name: tls_cert
flags.description: Default PEM server certificate chain for TLS listeners (a listener may override with ?cert=).

flags.name: tls_ciphers
flags.description: OpenSSL TLS 1.2 cipher list (forward-secret AEAD, Mozilla intermediate); TLS 1.3 suites are fixed by OpenSSL.

flags.name: tls_groups
flags.description: TLS key-exchange groups, colon-separated.

flags.name: tls_key
flags.description: Default PEM private key for --tls_cert.

flags.name: tls_min_version
flags.description: Minimum TLS version: 1.2 or 1.3 (legacy TLS is not supported).

flags.name: log_level
flags.description: Minimum log severity at process start: trace | debug | info | warning | error | fatal. Override at runtime with `SET logging_level = '<value>'`.

flags.name: log_path
flags.description: Path used by --log_storage, when it takes one. Its meaning is storage-dependent (for 'file', the log file or directory); ignored by storages that take no path, such as 'stdout' and 'memory'.

flags.name: log_storage
flags.description: Log destination at process start. Accepted values: 'stdout' (default; systemd/container log drivers capture it), 'memory' (queryable via SELECT * FROM duckdb_logs()), or 'file' (uses --log_path). Override at runtime with `CALL enable_logging(storage='<value>', storage_path='<path>')`.
